content:
Here’s a refined inquiry to send to The Venus Project’s current official contact address—based on the publicly listed email point, which is found on their Contacts page:

---

**To**: *[use the official contact form or email from TVP website—see details below]* ✉️  
**Subject:** Inquiry About Archived Monthly Magazine and Its Editor

Hello,

I hope this message finds you well. I’ve been a long-time follower of The Venus Project and have fond memories from around 2013–2016 of a **monthly magazine** published on your website. It was curated by a gentleman who stayed on-site with Jacque Fresco and Roxanne Meadows, and featured a thoughtfully linked format that greatly enriched my exploration of your ideas. I would be deeply grateful if you could let me know:

- Whether those **archived issues** are still available or somewhere accessible.
- Who the **author/editor** was—his name has slipped my memory, though it lingers with musical resonance.
